body:
## Goal
Rework PR #32 so `quartz.ts` is only a consumer of the fixed comments/preview environment contract. Provider- and runner-specific derivation should happen in workflow/env preparation before the Quartz build runs.

## Context
PR: https://github.com/self-evolving/literature-template/pull/32

The latest maintainer request agrees with the boundary that `quartz.ts` should not read or derive from provider-specific variables. Current conflicting code is around repo and preview derivation in `quartz.ts`, specifically the reads of `GITHUB_REPOSITORY`, `VERCEL_GIT_REPO_*`, `GITHUB_EVENT_NAME`, `GITHUB_REF`, and `GITHUB_HEAD_REF`.

The desired contract is that Quartz consumes only `GISCUS_*`, `SEPO_PREVIEW_*`, and `HYPOTHESIS_*`. Workflow/env-prep owns deriving those values from GitHub Actions context or repo variables.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Remove provider/runner derivation from `quartz.ts`; it must not read `GITHUB_REPOSITORY`, `VERCEL_GIT_REPO_*`, `GITHUB_EVENT_NAME`, `GITHUB_REF`, or `GITHUB_HEAD_REF`.
- Keep `quartz.ts` limited to validating/consuming the fixed env contract: `GISCUS_*`, `SEPO_PREVIEW_*`, and `HYPOTHESIS_*`.
- In workflow/env-prep, set `GISCUS_REPO` from `${{ github.repository }}` when it is not explicitly configured.
- In workflow/env-prep, set `GISCUS_CATEGORY=General` before `resolve-discussion-ids` when absent.
- In `agent-site-preview.yml`, set `SEPO_PREVIEW_PR` and `SEPO_PREVIEW_BRANCH` directly from pull request context.
- Keep `resolve-discussion-ids` responsible only for resolving `GISCUS_REPO` + `GISCUS_CATEGORY` into `GISCUS_REPO_ID` + `GISCUS_CATEGORY_ID`.
- Update README to document the fixed env contract and workflow-side derivation, not Quartz-side derivation.
- Preserve the existing strict/best-effort comments behavior and existing resolver retry behavior.

---

Requested via issue_comment at https://github.com/self-evolving/literature-template/pull/32

comments.body:
**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-33/codex-27444631883`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/literature-template/pull/34

Implemented the fixed comments env boundary: `quartz.ts` now only consumes documented `GISCUS_*`, `SEPO_PREVIEW_*`, and `HYPOTHESIS_*` values, while the workflows prepare repo/category/preview values and a resolver action fills Giscus IDs with bounded retry. Verified with `npm run check` and `npm run build`.

---
_Run: `codex` / `default model` / `xhigh`_

title: Move comments env derivation out of Quartz
